fa-arrow-down-up-across-line.appearanceId: two arrows pointing opposite directions (one down, one up) separated by a horizontal line; vertical double arrow split by a dividing horizontal bar
fa-arrow-down-up-across-line.functionalityId: swaps or reorders two items across a dividing boundary; rearranges content above and below a separator line
fa-arrow-down-up-across-line.intentId: reorganize items on either side of a partition; move content across a defined threshold

fa-arrow-down-up-lock.appearanceId: downward and upward arrow pair with a padlock badge at the intersection; vertical bidirectional arrows with a lock symbol overlaid
fa-arrow-down-up-lock.functionalityId: locks the sort order to prevent reordering; freezes the current ascending or descending arrangement
fa-arrow-down-up-lock.intentId: prevent changes to the current sort direction; preserve a fixed ordering of items

fa-arrow-down-z-a.appearanceId: downward arrow beside letter Z on top and letter A on bottom; descending arrow with Z-to-A label alongside
fa-arrow-down-z-a.functionalityId: sorts a list in reverse alphabetical order from Z to A; applies descending alphabetical ordering to items
fa-arrow-down-z-a.intentId: reorder text items from Z down to A; view a list arranged in reverse alphabetical sequence

fa-arrow-from-bottom.appearanceId: upward arrow emerging from a horizontal baseline at the bottom; vertical arrow rising out of a floor line
fa-arrow-from-bottom.functionalityId: moves or exports content upward from a base position; lifts an item away from the bottom boundary
fa-arrow-from-bottom.intentId: pull content up from a starting baseline; initiate an upward movement from ground level

fa-arrow-from-left.appearanceId: rightward arrow departing from a vertical left-side line; horizontal arrow pointing right that originates at a left boundary
fa-arrow-from-left.functionalityId: moves or exports content rightward away from a left edge; pushes an item out from the left boundary
fa-arrow-from-left.intentId: send content outward from the left side; initiate rightward movement from a left origin

fa-arrow-from-right.appearanceId: leftward arrow departing from a vertical right-side line; horizontal arrow pointing left that originates at a right boundary
fa-arrow-from-right.functionalityId: moves or exports content leftward away from a right edge; pushes an item out from the right boundary
fa-arrow-from-right.intentId: send content outward from the right side; initiate leftward movement from a right origin

fa-arrow-from-top.appearanceId: downward arrow emerging from a horizontal baseline at the top; vertical arrow descending from a ceiling line
fa-arrow-from-top.functionalityId: moves or exports content downward from a top position; lowers an item away from the top boundary
fa-arrow-from-top.intentId: pull content down from an upper starting point; initiate a downward movement from the top

fa-arrow-left.appearanceId: single horizontal arrow pointing left with arrowhead and shaft; leftward-facing chevron with a full horizontal stem
fa-arrow-left.functionalityId: navigates back to the previous screen or page; moves the selected item or cursor to the left
fa-arrow-left.intentId: go back to the previous view or step; shift focus or position leftward

fa-arrow-left-from-arc.appearanceId: leftward arrow departing from the inner side of a curved arc; horizontal arrow pointing left that exits a semicircular boundary
fa-arrow-left-from-arc.functionalityId: exits or escapes from a circular or arc-bounded region; moves content out of a curved container to the left
fa-arrow-left-from-arc.intentId: leave a looped or circular process; extract content from an arc-defined area

fa-arrow-left-from-bracket.appearanceId: leftward arrow originating inside a bracket and pointing out to the left; horizontal arrow exiting an open square bracket on the right
fa-arrow-left-from-bracket.functionalityId: logs out or signs out of a session; exports or removes an item from a bracketed container
fa-arrow-left-from-bracket.intentId: exit a session or enclosed area; move content out from a defined slot

fa-arrow-left-long.appearanceId: long horizontal arrow pointing left with an elongated shaft and arrowhead; extended leftward arrow spanning a wide horizontal distance
fa-arrow-left-long.functionalityId: navigates far back or returns to an earlier step; moves content a significant distance to the left
fa-arrow-left-long.intentId: return to a distant previous point in a flow; emphasize a leftward or backward direction

fa-arrow-left-long-to-line.appearanceId: long leftward arrow with its tip meeting a vertical stop line; extended horizontal arrow pointing left that terminates at a wall
fa-arrow-left-long-to-line.functionalityId: moves or scrolls content all the way to the leftmost boundary; navigates back to the very beginning of a sequence
fa-arrow-left-long-to-line.intentId: jump to the far-left or first position in a layout; go to the starting edge of a range

fa-arrow-left-to-arc.appearanceId: leftward arrow with its tip touching the outer curve of an arc; horizontal arrow pointing left that terminates at a curved boundary
fa-arrow-left-to-arc.functionalityId: moves content into or toward a circular or arc-shaped region; navigates into a looped workflow from the right
fa-arrow-left-to-arc.intentId: enter a curved or circular process; direct content toward an arc-defined destination

fa-arrow-left-to-bracket.appearanceId: leftward arrow with its tip entering an open bracket on the left side; horizontal arrow pointing into a square bracket container
fa-arrow-left-to-bracket.functionalityId: imports or inserts content into a bracketed slot; logs in or enters a defined container from the right
fa-arrow-left-to-bracket.intentId: bring content into an enclosed area; sign in or import into a designated space

fa-arrow-pointer.appearanceId: diagonal arrow pointing up-left like a mouse cursor; thin angular pointer arrow angled at 45 degrees
fa-arrow-pointer.functionalityId: selects or interacts with UI elements; positions the cursor at a target
fa-arrow-pointer.intentId: point to and click on an item; indicate an interactive element

fa-arrow-progress.appearanceId: curved or stepped arrow forming a partial loop with a progress-style path; arrow following an L-shaped or zigzag track indicating sequential steps
fa-arrow-progress.functionalityId: advances through a workflow or multi-step process; moves to the next stage in a sequential pipeline
fa-arrow-progress.intentId: track or continue progress through a structured sequence; proceed to the next step in a defined flow

fa-arrow-right.appearanceId: single horizontal arrow pointing right with arrowhead and shaft; rightward-facing chevron with a full horizontal stem
fa-arrow-right.functionalityId: navigates forward to the next screen or page; moves the selected item or cursor to the right
fa-arrow-right.intentId: advance to the next view or step; shift focus or position rightward

fa-arrow-right-from-arc.appearanceId: rightward arrow departing from the inner side of a curved arc; horizontal arrow pointing right that exits a semicircular boundary
fa-arrow-right-from-arc.functionalityId: exits or escapes from a circular or arc-bounded region to the right; moves content out of a curved container rightward
fa-arrow-right-from-arc.intentId: leave a looped or circular process to the right; extract content from an arc-defined area

fa-arrow-right-long.appearanceId: long horizontal arrow pointing right with an elongated shaft and arrowhead; extended rightward arrow spanning a wide horizontal distance
fa-arrow-right-long.functionalityId: navigates forward or proceeds to a much later step; moves content a significant distance to the right
fa-arrow-right-long.intentId: advance to a distant next point in a flow; emphasize a rightward or forward direction

fa-arrow-right-long-to-line.appearanceId: long rightward arrow with its tip meeting a vertical stop line; extended horizontal arrow pointing right that terminates at a wall
fa-arrow-right-long-to-line.functionalityId: moves or scrolls content all the way to the rightmost boundary; navigates forward to the very end of a sequence
fa-arrow-right-long-to-line.intentId: jump to the far-right or last position in a layout; go to the ending edge of a range

fa-arrow-right-to-arc.appearanceId: rightward arrow with its tip touching the outer curve of an arc; horizontal arrow pointing right that terminates at a curved boundary
fa-arrow-right-to-arc.functionalityId: moves content into or toward a circular or arc-shaped region; navigates into a looped workflow from the left
fa-arrow-right-to-arc.intentId: enter a curved or circular process from the left side; direct content toward an arc-defined destination

fa-arrow-right-to-city.appearanceId: rightward arrow pointing toward a city skyline silhouette with buildings; horizontal arrow directed at an urban building cluster
fa-arrow-right-to-city.functionalityId: navigates toward or into a city or urban location; routes the user to a city-based destination
fa-arrow-right-to-city.intentId: travel or navigate to a city; find an urban destination or city resource

fa-arrow-square-down.appearanceId: downward arrow enclosed inside a square border; vertical arrow pointing down contained within a box outline
fa-arrow-square-down.functionalityId: downloads or collapses content into a square container; moves an item downward within a defined box
fa-arrow-square-down.intentId: save or pull content downward into a bounded area; download or minimize to a square region

fa-arrow-square-left.appearanceId: leftward arrow enclosed inside a square border; horizontal arrow pointing left contained within a box outline
fa-arrow-square-left.functionalityId: navigates back or moves content leftward within a square container; shifts an item left inside a bounded box
fa-arrow-square-left.intentId: go back or move left within a defined boxed region; navigate leftward in a contained area

fa-arrow-square-right.appearanceId: rightward arrow enclosed inside a square border; horizontal arrow pointing right contained within a box outline
fa-arrow-square-right.functionalityId: navigates forward or moves content rightward within a square container; shifts an item right inside a bounded box
fa-arrow-square-right.intentId: advance or move right within a defined boxed region; navigate rightward in a contained area

fa-arrow-square-up.appearanceId: upward arrow enclosed inside a square border; vertical arrow pointing up contained within a box outline
fa-arrow-square-up.functionalityId: uploads or expands content upward within a square container; moves an item up inside a bounded box
fa-arrow-square-up.intentId: submit or push content upward within a bounded area; upload or elevate within a square region

fa-arrow-to-bottom.appearanceId: downward arrow with its tip meeting a horizontal baseline at the bottom; vertical arrow pointing down toward a floor line
fa-arrow-to-bottom.functionalityId: scrolls or moves content all the way to the bottom boundary; downloads or deposits content at the lowest position
fa-arrow-to-bottom.intentId: go to the very bottom of a list or page; move content to the lowest defined position

fa-arrow-to-left.appearanceId: leftward arrow with its tip meeting a vertical left-side boundary line; horizontal arrow pointing left toward a wall
fa-arrow-to-left.functionalityId: moves or docks content all the way to the leftmost edge; snaps an item to the left boundary
fa-arrow-to-left.intentId: align or move content to the far-left position; push items to the leftmost edge

fa-arrow-to-right.appearanceId: rightward arrow with its tip meeting a vertical right-side boundary line; horizontal arrow pointing right toward a wall
fa-arrow-to-right.functionalityId: moves or docks content all the way to the rightmost edge; snaps an item to the right boundary
fa-arrow-to-right.intentId: align or move content to the far-right position; push items to the rightmost edge

fa-arrow-to-top.appearanceId: upward arrow with its tip meeting a horizontal ceiling line at the top; vertical arrow pointing up toward a top boundary
fa-arrow-to-top.functionalityId: scrolls or moves content all the way to the top boundary; uploads or raises content to the highest position
fa-arrow-to-top.intentId: go to the very top of a list or page; move content to the highest defined position

fa-arrow-trend-down.appearanceId: diagonal arrow curving or angling downward from upper-left to lower-right; sloping arrow trending in a declining direction
fa-arrow-trend-down.functionalityId: displays or highlights a declining trend in data; indicates a downward movement in a metric or value
fa-arrow-trend-down.intentId: see that a value or metric is decreasing over time; identify a downward performance trend

fa-arrow-trend-up.appearanceId: diagonal arrow curving or angling upward from lower-left to upper-right; sloping arrow trending in a rising direction
fa-arrow-trend-up.functionalityId: displays or highlights a rising trend in data; indicates an upward movement in a metric or value
fa-arrow-trend-up.intentId: see that a value or metric is increasing over time; identify an upward performance trend

fa-arrow-turn-down-left.appearanceId: arrow that goes downward and then turns to point left, forming an L-shape; bent arrow with a vertical segment leading into a leftward horizontal segment
fa-arrow-turn-down-left.functionalityId: navigates down and then redirects content to the left; routes a flow downward and then leftward
fa-arrow-turn-down-left.intentId: follow a path that descends and then turns left; redirect a sequence toward the lower-left

fa-arrow-turn-down-right.appearanceId: arrow that goes downward and then turns to point right, forming a reversed-L shape; bent arrow with a vertical segment leading into a rightward horizontal segment
fa-arrow-turn-down-right.functionalityId: navigates down and then redirects content to the right; routes a flow downward and then rightward
fa-arrow-turn-down-right.intentId: follow a path that descends and then turns right; redirect a sequence toward the lower-right

fa-arrow-turn-left.appearanceId: arrow that travels horizontally and bends upward or leftward at a right angle; hook-shaped arrow turning toward the left
fa-arrow-turn-left.functionalityId: redirects flow or navigation to the left at a turn point; turns the current direction leftward
fa-arrow-turn-left.intentId: take a left turn in a navigation or workflow; redirect content or movement to the left

fa-arrow-turn-left-down.appearanceId: arrow that goes left and then bends downward, forming an L pointing down-left; bent arrow with a horizontal segment leading into a downward vertical segment
fa-arrow-turn-left-down.functionalityId: redirects flow leftward and then downward; routes a path toward the left and then descends
fa-arrow-turn-left-down.intentId: follow a path that goes left and then down; redirect a sequence toward the lower-left

fa-arrow-turn-left-up.appearanceId: arrow that goes left and then bends upward, forming an L pointing up-left; bent arrow with a horizontal segment leading into an upward vertical segment
fa-arrow-turn-left-up.functionalityId: redirects flow leftward and then upward; routes a path toward the left and then ascends
fa-arrow-turn-left-up.intentId: follow a path that goes left and then up; redirect a sequence toward the upper-left

fa-arrow-turn-right.appearanceId: arrow that travels horizontally and bends upward or rightward at a right angle; hook-shaped arrow turning toward the right
fa-arrow-turn-right.functionalityId: redirects flow or navigation to the right at a turn point; turns the current direction rightward
fa-arrow-turn-right.intentId: take a right turn in a navigation or workflow; redirect content or movement to the right

fa-arrow-up.appearanceId: single vertical arrow pointing upward with arrowhead and shaft; upward-facing chevron with a full vertical stem
fa-arrow-up.functionalityId: scrolls or navigates upward on a page or list; moves the selected item or cursor upward
fa-arrow-up.intentId: go up to a higher position in a list or view; shift focus or content in the upward direction

fa-arrow-up-1-9.appearanceId: upward arrow beside the numeral 1 on top and numeral 9 on bottom; ascending arrow with a 1-to-9 numeric label alongside
fa-arrow-up-1-9.functionalityId: sorts a list in ascending numeric order from 1 to 9; applies lowest-to-highest numerical ordering to items
fa-arrow-up-1-9.intentId: reorder numeric items from smallest to largest; view a list arranged in ascending numerical sequence

fa-arrow-up-9-1.appearanceId: upward arrow beside the numeral 9 on top and numeral 1 on bottom; ascending arrow with a 9-to-1 numeric label alongside
fa-arrow-up-9-1.functionalityId: sorts a list in descending numeric order from 9 to 1; applies highest-to-lowest numerical ordering to items
fa-arrow-up-9-1.intentId: reorder numeric items from largest to smallest; view a list arranged in descending numerical sequence

fa-arrow-up-a-z.appearanceId: upward arrow beside letter A on top and letter Z on bottom; ascending arrow with an A-to-Z alphabetical label alongside
fa-arrow-up-a-z.functionalityId: sorts a list in ascending alphabetical order from A to Z; applies standard A-to-Z ordering to text items
fa-arrow-up-a-z.intentId: reorder text items from A through to Z; view a list arranged in standard alphabetical sequence

fa-arrow-up-from-arc.appearanceId: upward arrow rising from the inside of a curved arc below it; vertical arrow pointing up that originates within a semicircular boundary
fa-arrow-up-from-arc.functionalityId: uploads or extracts content upward out of a circular or arc region; lifts an item out of a curved container
fa-arrow-up-from-arc.intentId: pull content out of a looped or circular area; export upward from an arc-defined region

fa-arrow-up-from-bracket.appearanceId: upward arrow rising from inside an open bracket at the bottom; vertical arrow pointing up that exits a square bracket below it
fa-arrow-up-from-bracket.functionalityId: uploads or exports content upward out of a bracket or container; submits an item from a slot to an external destination
fa-arrow-up-from-bracket.intentId: push content out of a defined slot upward; upload or extract from a contained area

fa-arrow-up-from-dotted-line.appearanceId: upward arrow rising from a horizontal dotted line below it; vertical arrow pointing up that departs from a dashed baseline
fa-arrow-up-from-dotted-line.functionalityId: moves or uploads content upward past a marked threshold line; lifts an item above a dashed boundary
fa-arrow-up-from-dotted-line.intentId: raise content above a defined dotted boundary; move an item from below a threshold to above it

fa-arrow-up-from-ground-water.appearanceId: upward arrow rising from a wavy water line above a ground layer; vertical arrow emerging from water at ground level
fa-arrow-up-from-ground-water.functionalityId: extracts or pumps water upward from a ground source; initiates water retrieval from an underground level
fa-arrow-up-from-ground-water.intentId: access groundwater or draw water from below the surface; manage water extraction from a ground source

fa-arrow-up-from-square.appearanceId: upward arrow rising out of the top of a square outline; vertical arrow exiting through the open top of a box
fa-arrow-up-from-square.functionalityId: exports or uploads content out of a square container; lifts an item upward out of a bounded box
fa-arrow-up-from-square.intentId: share or export content from a box or storage area; send an item out of a defined square region

fa-arrow-up-from-water-pump.appearanceId: upward arrow rising above a water pump silhouette with a spout and handle; vertical arrow departing upward from a pump fixture
fa-arrow-up-from-water-pump.functionalityId: activates or indicates water being pumped upward; initiates water extraction or pumping from a source
fa-arrow-up-from-water-pump.intentId: operate a water pump to draw water up; access or enable a water pumping function
